answer: Florida purchase escrow disbursement reconciliation for FNF National Title was overstated on September 15, 2026 because `settlement_disbursement_recon_v3` joined `party_identity_bridge` on `normalized_tax_id`, which is not unique at closing-role grain and can repeat across buyer and seller roles. The correct join key is `closing_party_role_id`, so `finance.disbursement_recon_daily` needs to be rebuilt and backfilled for Florida purchase closings.

facts.affected_segment: florida purchase closings for fnf national title
facts.remediation: rebuild finance.disbursement_recon_daily using closing_party_role_id and backfill florida purchase closings
